headline: FUL Stock Is Riding Medical, Aerospace and Pricing Trends
summary: FUL is tapping medical, aerospace and pricing trends to support margins, but volume weakness still clouds its path to stronger growth.

headline: H.B. Fuller Stock Outlook Hinges on Margins, Mix and M&A
summary: FUL's outlook rests on pricing, margins and portfolio reshaping as medical expansion and M&A aim to offset uneven demand across key end markets.

headline: Is FUL Stock a Buy Now or a Value Trap for Cautious Investors?
summary: FUL trades near the low end of its five-year valuation range as improving earnings meet volume, inflation and leverage risks tied to its medical-market expansion.
